Document:
# Command Maid This is the list of procedures, responsibilities, and duties of the [color=#1b67a5][bold]Command Maid[/bold][/color] of this station.
1. The Maid must prompty respond to any call from command member for them to clean or provide other any forms of assistance. Failure to respond within a timely manner is to be considered a breach of Standard Operating Procedure.
2. The Maid may be assigned any tasks by other members of command, in order to assist in their duties. If there are multiple tasks, they should be prioritized according to the Chain of Command.
3. The Maid functions as a trusted assistant for command, but is not a full member and does not have the same authority that any other member of command may have.
2. The Maid, when free of any other tasks, may participate in duties according to the Janitor SOP, however this should not interfere with the other responsibilities of the Maid.
